creator: toasty@dragondata.com
text:
> >Description:
> When I try to install over ftp, I use the 2 boot disks and then I allcate
> the entire disk for freebsd, then I have FreeBsd auto layout the
> partition.  Next I say I want to customize the instaliation, then I get a
> signal 11, and I can't seem to get freebsd installed.


See http://www.freebsd.org/releases/3.4R/errata.html for a description of
this problem, and two workarounds.


Kevin
